  • Package

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    CreationDateProvider
    Provides a creation date for a given media file.
    ExifCreationDateProvider
    A CreationDateProvider that extracts creation timestamps from media file metadata using the metadata-extractor library.
    FileModifiedCreationDateProvider
    Provides the creation date of a file based on its last modified time.
    FileNameCreationDateProvider
    Provides the creation date of a file based on its EXIF creation time.
    FolderGroup
    Folder grouping strategies.
    MediaSortCmd
     
    MediaSorter
    Main entry point for the Media Sorter application.
    MediaSorterApplication
    JavaFX entry point for the Media Sorter application.
    MediaSortResult
    Holds the result of the media sort
    MediaSortTask
    Background task responsible for sorting and organizing media files (photos and videos).
    MediaSortUtils
    Utility class containing helper methods and constants for media sorting operations.
    SubStats
    Holds statistics for a single eBird checklist submission.
    TextAreaAppender
    Custom Logback appender that outputs log messages to a JavaFX TextArea.
